text:
Question: Sam placed ice water outside on a humid day. What appears on the outside of the glass?
A. Water droplets
B. Ash
C. Paint
D. Sand
label: A

text:
Question: A person forgot an umbrella during a storm. What are they most likely to become?
(A) Hungry (B) Wet (C) Lost (D) Bored
label: B

text:
Question: A child touches a hot pan and pulls back. What caused the reaction?
A) A joke
B) A calendar
C) A reflex to pain
D) A map
label: C

text:
Question: If a room is dark, what would help someone read a book?
Options: A: Closing the book | B: Adding salt | C: Opening a wallet | D: Turning on a light
label: D

text:
Question: A carton of milk smells sour. What should you probably do?
A. Avoid drinking it
B. Drink all of it
C. Leave it in the sun
D. Paint it
label: A

text:
Question: A driver sees a red traffic light. What should they do?
(A) Speed up (B) Stop (C) Turn off headlights (D) Open the trunk
label: B

text:
Question: A plant has not been watered for weeks. What is most likely?
A) It will become metal
B) It will write
C) It may wilt
D) It will freeze instantly
label: C

text:
Question: Someone hears a smoke alarm at night. What is the safest first response?
Options: A: Ignore it | B: Start cooking | C: Close every exit | D: Check for danger and leave if needed
label: D

text:
Question: A sweater is too large after trying it on. What is a reasonable action?
A. Return or exchange it
B. Charge a phone
C. Boil water
D. Paint a wall
label: A

text:
Question: A phone battery is at 1 percent. What should the owner do?
(A) Wash it (B) Charge it (C) Cut it (D) Freeze it
label: B

text:
Question: A friend whispers in a library. Why?
A) To make soup
B) To measure rain
C) To avoid disturbing others
D) To buy shoes
label: C

text:
Question: If bread is left in a toaster too long, what may happen?
Options: A: It may grow leaves | B: It may become ice | C: It may send email | D: It may burn
label: D
